label: DSG Website
useWhen: Use for public-facing reference, brand context, and external links.

label: DSG Brand Kit Info
useWhen: Use before drafting public or team-facing communications. Contains DSG voice, tone, mission, colors, typography, positioning, and program identity.

label: DSG Brief Builder
useWhen: Use to create structured DSG briefs, internal updates, task summaries, and review-ready team communications.

label: DSG Share Folder
useWhen: Use as the main shared storage location for team files and final deliverables.

label: Grants Folder
useWhen: Use for grant research, staged funding materials, funder notes, and development-ready documents.

label: Zeffy
useWhen: Use for registrant lists, campaigns, workshop communication, and donation-related records.

label: DSG GPT
useWhen: Use to draft DSG-branded email copy, HTML blocks, brief language, prompts, and review checklists.

label: Complete AI Bundle
useWhen: Use for AI prompt examples, templates, and inspiration when building or improving DSG prompt workflows.

label: ChatGPT Mega Prompt Bundle
useWhen: Use for prompt patterns and examples when improving GPT-assisted team workflows.

label: Canva
useWhen: Use for final designed assets, graphics, and branded visual templates.

label: Buffer Schedule
useWhen: Use for social scheduling after copy and assets are reviewed.

label: Manychat Automations
useWhen: Use for Messenger or automation review when a workflow touches chatbot messaging.

label: Meta Business Suite
useWhen: Use for Facebook or Instagram business account management and post review.

label: Relay
useWhen: Use for banking, receipts, payments, and finance cleanup tasks.

label: NY Charities Registration
useWhen: Use for New York charities registration filing and compliance reference.

label: IRS Charities and Nonprofits
useWhen: Use for federal nonprofit compliance reference.

label: IRS StayExempt
useWhen: Use for nonprofit compliance learning and board/admin education.

label: Getting In On the Act
useWhen: Use for participatory arts, audience involvement spectrum, co-creation, and audience-as-artist framing.

label: Experience / Engagement Video
useWhen: Use as a learning or discussion resource when shaping audience experience and engagement strategy.

label: UX Design Process
useWhen: Use when improving task flows, resource hubs, user journeys, and prototype structure.

label: The New Experience Economy Webinar
useWhen: Use for experience economy framing and strategy discussion.

label: Experience Economy Overview
useWhen: Use for a quick concept overview of experience economy language and framing.

label: Audience Participation Research PDF
useWhen: Use for deeper research on participation, audience meaning-making, and engagement theory.

label: Welcome to the Experience Economy
useWhen: Use for classic experience economy framing and language.

label: Making Sense of Audience Engagement
useWhen: Use when developing audience engagement language, program framing, and workshop/post-mortem thinking.
